items.title: AMD Software Guide / Explanation.

items.content_html:
Radeon Anti-Lag:

It reduces input latency ( for example how much time it will take when you press mouse button and the bullet will fire on your screen ) by cost of 10-20 FPS depending on your hardware. In simple term when you turn this setting on you get lower latency then before but you will lose 10-20 FPS.

Recommended settings:

on: If you are playing competitive games like Counter Strike, Valorant etc.

off: If you are playing story / offline games like Last of us, Uncharted etc.

"If you are not even getting playable fps then just turn this setting off it will give you some fps"
